name: tenshoku-add1
style: Elegant single-weight LINE-ART illustration (outline style): the figure and every object are drawn as thin, luminous GOLD outlines on a deep navy background (#0e1024) — NOT filled color blocks, NOT a chibi/mascot, NOT a solid silhouette. Minimal and refined, plenty of empty space, a thin gold ground ellipse under the figure. Exactly one element glows softly in the specified accent color; everything else stays gold line-art. Calm, dignified scenes with a gentle fantasy-journey flavor. The figure is small, shown from behind or in clean profile — never a forward-facing face, keep the face plain/featureless. GENERIC only: no specific religious symbols or sect emblems, no recognizable people, brands, franchises, or logos. STRICT: no text, no letters, no numbers, no real glyphs, no speech bubbles, no sun or large glowing disc, a single calm scene, no collage, no split panels.

items.prompt: A religious practitioner (宗教家・僧侶・神職・牧師 — keep it generic, no sect symbols): a robed figure in profile, hands together in quiet prayer beside a simple wooden altar with a single candle. Accent glow: emerald green light of the candle flame.

A caretaker of one temple/shrine/church (住職・宮司・主任牧師 — generic): a robed figure from behind sweeping a quiet stone path toward a simple wooden hall, a hanging lantern by the door. Accent glow: emerald green light of the lantern.

A senior steward of a great religious compound (本山・教区の要職 — generic): a robed figure from behind standing on a wooden veranda of a grand hall, overlooking many small rooftops below. Accent glow: emerald green light from one distant rooftop window.

The head of a religious order (宗派のトップ — generic): an elder robed figure in profile addressing rows of seated robed figures in a vast quiet hall with tall pillars. Accent glow: emerald green light of a ceremonial lamp beside the elder.

A world-religion leader (世界宗教の頂 — generic, no real person): a small robed figure from behind on a high balcony, arms gently open toward a vast crowd of tiny figures far below. Accent glow: soft emerald green aura around the figure's open hands.

A venture capitalist (ベンチャーキャピタリスト): a figure in profile across a small table from a younger founder figure, sliding a small pouch toward a tiny sapling in a pot between them. Accent glow: warm amber light of the sapling's leaves.

An angel investor (エンジェル投資家): a figure in profile gently watering a small sprout that grows from a plain coin disc (no numbers, no letters) set in the ground. Accent glow: warm amber light of the sprout.

A renowned investor / fund founder (著名投資家): a figure from behind standing on a low hill, overlooking neat rows of young trees growing across a field. Accent glow: warm amber light on the row of nearest trees.

A legendary long-term investor (世界的投資家): an elder figure in profile seated on a simple bench beneath one vast old broad tree; a few plain coin discs (no numbers, no letters) hang among the branches like fruit. Accent glow: warm amber light of one coin-fruit.
